title: On Bubbas — Dominic spiraling, Sammy adrift, family fragmentation in 2025
html:
On Bubbas — Dominic spiraling, Sammy adrift, family fragmentation in 2025

Source: 2025-06-21 Apple Note. Yahir's hardest family-observation note in the corpus — documenting Dominic's apparent dissociation/breakdown and the surrounding family scattering (Tio Edgar moving to Mexico, Maile burnt out and leaving).

TL;DR

  • Dominic described as "brain dead potato": speaks in metaphysical abstract — "this universe's god is a mushroom, I bounce around universes and to jump I had to kill myself, humans have telepathic abilities but just don't utilize it" — and lies in bed with no phone, no indulgences, just staring at the ceiling.
  • "He is numb, stuck in an aggressive loop. He doesn't care about things anymore. Idk if this is depression maybe it's more than this."
  • Family scattering: Sammy wants to be near his brother and is "coming into his own and experiencing this is fucked"; Maile is burnt out and moving out; Tío Edgar is jaded and decided to move to Mexico.
  • "I want to be there for Sammy. My sister wants to be there for Sammy." — Yahir + sister assuming caretaker roles.
  • The hardest line: "Unfortunately I don't know the outcome for Dominic, he may kill himself, he may slowly integrate himself back into society, he may be this abstract brain numb entity in a hospital. He feels like his outcome is determined and being manipulated by externals."
  • Comes ~1 month after the May 2025 todos — Yahir is in Brotein crunch + Austin-prep mode, simultaneously processing a family member's collapse.

Pattern observed

This is the dark counterweight to the manifesto notes — Yahir's normal voice is "max effort commit / fall backwards into void with smile / walk with God's eyes." Here, faced with someone he loves who has gone fully passive and dissociated, the manifesto-language is absent. He doesn't try to fix it with a pep-talk. The note ends in genuine uncertainty.

This is also the first appearance of Dominic, Sammy, Maile, Tío Edgar in a single note — the extended family graph snaps into focus during a crisis.

Open questions

  • What was Dominic's outcome over the next 12 months?
  • Is Dominic the same Dominic mentioned in the 2024 10 31 note and the mega notebook (gift list: "Dominic communist poster")?
  • Sammy = Dominic's younger brother?

Related

  • sammy
  • maile
  • tio edgar
  • yahir family
  • 2024 10 31 dominic — earlier Dominic note for context
  • mental health in the family
